クラス CapabilityProfiler

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.CapabilityProfiler
public class CapabilityProfiler extends Object
Derives capability scores for each character in a party by running controlled simulation experiments.

Seven core experiment templates are run per character:

  • A — full on-field presence: measures raw on-field DPS
  • B — passive presence: measures off-field damage after skill+burst
  • C/D — team support under a simple normal-attack carry script
  • E — self with burst: measures self-enhanced DPS
  • F — self without burst: baseline for self-enhancement measurement
  • G — energy counting: measures ER-scaled particles per skill use

The exported team_buff_score is intentionally kept as a single support-ness scalar for RL consumption, but it is now derived from permutation-wide support profiling instead of a single fixed-carry script.

Results are written to a JSON file loadable by ObservationEncoder.

    private double
    runTemplateA(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template A: subject on field for full episode, uses skill/burst whenever available.
    private double
    runTemplateB(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId dummyId)
    Template B: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, swaps off.
    private double
    runTemplateE(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template E: subject on field for full episode, uses burst at t=0, then ATTACKs only.
    private double
    runTemplateF(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template F: subject on field for full episode, never uses burst, only skill+attack.
    private double
    runTemplateG(CharacterId subjectId)
    Template G: subject uses skill once (from fresh sim with 0 energy), then idles 5s.
    private CapabilityProfiler.TeamBuffProfileResult
    searchPermutationMaxUplift(CharacterId[] permutation, CharacterId subjectId, List<List<CharacterActionKey>> assignedSequences, int index)
     
    private boolean
    shouldDropForBuffOnlyProbe(Buff buff, CharacterId subjectId, double subjectSyncTime)
     
    private static double
    stddev(double[] values)
     
    private static void
    swap(CharacterId[] values, int left, int right)
     
    private void
    useBurstIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)
     
    private void
    useSkillIfReady(CombatSimulator sim, CharacterId id)

    Writes the profiling results to a JSON file.
    static void
    writeJson(String path, Map<CharacterId, double[]> sourceResults)
    Writes the supplied results map to a JSON file at the given path.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • CapabilityProfiler

      public CapabilityProfiler(Supplier<CombatSimulator> simulatorSupplier, EpisodeConfig config)
      Constructs a profiler that uses the supplied factory to instantiate fresh simulators for each experiment.
      パラメータ:
      simulatorSupplier - factory producing a fresh combat simulator
      config - episode configuration providing the party order to profile

  • メソッドの詳細

    • runAll

      public void runAll()
      Runs all templates for every character in EpisodeConfig.partyOrder. Results are stored internally and can be written via writeJson(String).

    • writeJson

      public void writeJson(String path) throws IOException
      Writes the profiling results to a JSON file.
      パラメータ:
      path - destination file path (parent directories must exist)
      例外:
      IOException - if the file cannot be written

    • getResults

      public Map<CharacterId, double[]> getResults()
      Returns a deep copy of the per-character profiling results.
      戻り値:
      map keyed by character id, with cloned score arrays as values

    • writeJson

      public static void writeJson(String path, Map<CharacterId, double[]> sourceResults) throws IOException
      Writes the supplied results map to a JSON file at the given path.
      パラメータ:
      path - destination JSON file path (parent directories will be created)
      sourceResults - map of character id to capability score array
      例外:
      IOException - if the file cannot be written

    • profileCharacter

      private double[] profileCharacter(CharacterId subjectId)

    • runTemplateA

      private double runTemplateA(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template A: subject on field for full episode, uses skill/burst whenever available.

    • runTemplateB

      private double runTemplateB(CharacterId subjectId, CharacterId dummyId)
      Template B: subject uses skill+burst at t=0, swaps off. Dummy attacker fills the next 20 seconds. Records only the subject's off-field damage after the swap.

    • runPermutationTeamBuffProfile

      private CapabilityProfiler.TeamBuffProfileResult runPermutationTeamBuffProfile(CharacterId subjectId)

    • searchPermutationMaxUplift

      private CapabilityProfiler.TeamBuffProfileResult searchPermutationMaxUplift(CharacterId[] permutation, CharacterId subjectId, List<List<CharacterActionKey>> assignedSequences, int index)

    • runPermutationScenarioMaxUplift

      private CapabilityProfiler.TeamBuffProfileResult runPermutationScenarioMaxUplift(CharacterId[] order, CharacterId subjectId, List<List<CharacterActionKey>> assignedSequences)

    • runTemplateE

      private double runTemplateE(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template E: subject on field for full episode, uses burst at t=0, then ATTACKs only.

    • runTemplateF

      private double runTemplateF(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template F: subject on field for full episode, never uses burst, only skill+attack.

    • runTemplateG

      private double runTemplateG(CharacterId subjectId)
      Template G: subject uses skill once (from fresh sim with 0 energy), then idles 5s. Records ER-scaled particle energy received.

      private double runEntryValueTemplate(CharacterId subjectId)

    • runSustainValueTemplate
